caption: Hey guys, it's Clara 🌸 I can't believe we're finally here in the Greek islands! The sun is hitting my skin so perfectly and I'm just soaking up every bit of this freedom. No schedule, no worries—just me, this tiny dress, and endless warmth. Here's to the good life, am I right? ☀️👙 #GreekIslandVibes #SpringEscape #BarelyThereStyle
